Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 34 

MDCR_STATUS_CD 

LABEL: Medicare Status Code — Annual Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates how a beneficiary currently qualifies for Medicare. This field is the latest valid 
value from the monthly Medicare Status Code field (MDCR_STATUS_CD_01–MDCR_STATUS_CD_12); if 
there is not a valid monthly MDCR_STATUS_CD during the year, then this value is
